raw_text:
Nimbus Data Systems // Lead Cloud Engineer

San Francisco, CA (Remote-first, US-based preferred) | Full-time | $185,000 - $240,000 USD
annually

Enterprise cloud infrastructure made simple and scalable

>> ABOUT

Nimbus Data Systems is a Series B cloud infrastructure company founded in 2018,
specializing in helping mid-market and enterprise customers optimize, secure, and scale

their multi-cloud environments. We work with over 500+ customers across North America and
Europe to reduce cloud costs, improve deployment velocity, and maintain security

compliance. Our platform automates infrastructure provisioning, cost optimization, and
governance across AWS, Azure, and GCP.

>> SUMMARY

We're seeking an experienced Lead Cloud Engineer to guide our infrastructure and cloud
platform team. You'll lead a team of 4-5 engineers, architect cloud solutions for

enterprise customers, and drive best practices across AWS, Terraform, and infrastructure-
as-code practices. This role requires 6+ years of cloud engineering experience, with

proven leadership in building and mentoring high-performing teams. You'll own the
technical roadmap for our cloud provisioning platform, mentor junior engineers, and

collaborate with product and customer success teams to deliver scalable solutions.

>> RESPONSIBILITIES

- Lead and mentor a team of 4-5 cloud engineers, conducting code reviews, career

development planning, and performance evaluations
- Architect and design scalable, secure, and cost-optimized AWS infrastructure

solutions for enterprise customers using VPC, EC2, Lambda, RDS, and managed services
- Champion infrastructure-as-code practices by leading Terraform and CloudFormation

adoption across the team and customer base
- Own the technical roadmap for the cloud provisioning platform, collaborating with

product managers to prioritize features and improvements
- Design and implement cost optimization strategies for customer environments,

reducing cloud spend by 20-40% through reserved instances, auto-scaling, and reserved
capacity

- Establish and enforce cloud security best practices, including IAM policies,
encryption, VPC design, and compliance (SOC 2, HIPAA) requirements

- Drive cross-functional projects with networking, DevOps, and SRE teams to improve
platform reliability and customer experience

- Represent Nimbus Data at customer technical reviews and architecture sessions,
providing thought leadership on cloud infrastructure design

>> MUST HAVE

- 6+ years of hands-on cloud engineering experience, with at least 3+ years focused on
AWS (EC2, VPC, IAM, Lambda, RDS)

- 2+ years of proven team leadership or senior engineer experience mentoring junior
and mid-level engineers

- Expert-level proficiency in Terraform and infrastructure-as-code principles;
experience with CloudFormation and CDK a plus

 - Deep understanding of cloud networking, security groups, VPC design, and routing;

hands-on experience with AWS networking services (VPN, Direct Connect, Transit
Gateway)

- Demonstrated experience optimizing cloud costs, rightsizing instances, and
implementing savings plans or reserved instance strategies

- Strong scripting and automation skills in Bash, Python, or Go; experience with CI/CD
pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or Jenkins)

>> NICE TO HAVE

- AWS certifications (Solutions Architect Professional or Security Specialty)
- Experience with multi-cloud infrastructure (Azure or GCP) and cloud migration

projects
- Familiarity with containerization and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes) and

serverless architectures
- Published technical content, conference speaking, or active participation in cloud

communities

>> STACK

AWS (EC2, VPC, IAM, Lambda, RDS, ECS/EKS, S3, CloudWatch) / Terraform / CloudFormation / Python

/ Bash/Shell scripting / GitHub/GitLab / AWS Systems Manager / Cost Explorer & Compute Optimizer

/ Networking (DNS, SSL/TLS, VPN, Direct Connect) / Prometheus/CloudWatch for monitoring

>> BENEFITS

- Competitive health insurance (medical, dental, vision with 90% company coverage for

employees)
- 401(k) matching (4% match on first 6% contributed) and unlimited PTO

- Remote-first work culture with flexible scheduling and quarterly in-person team
meetings

- Professional development budget ($2,000/year) for certifications, conferences, and
training

- Equity package (stock options) and annual performance bonuses (10-20% of salary)
- Home office stipend ($1,500 one-time setup) and free cloud credits for learning

- Mental health support (Headspace stipend) and wellness programs
- Team lunch stipends and bi-weekly social events

>> APPLY

Apply directly through our careers page at careers.nimbusdata.com/jobs or email your
resume, GitHub profile, and a cover letter describing your leadership experience and most

interesting infrastructure project to careers@nimbusdata.com. Submissions are reviewed on
a rolling basis.
